title: armeria pseudarmeria subsp. ciliata
intro: Armeria pseudarmeria subsp. ciliata, also known as the Sea Thrift, is a flowering plant that belongs to the Plumbaginaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The plant's health benefits include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial properties that help fight off infections. Armeria pseudarmeria subsp. ciliata is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, to support overall health and well-being.
